description: A critical race condition has been detected in the 'inventory-system' project at `~/IdeaProjects/inventory-system`. The `InventoryService` class handles stock reservations, but under high load, it allows overselling (stock goes negative) or loses updates. Modify the `reserveStock` method in `src/main/java/com/store/inventory/InventoryService.java` to make it thread-safe and ensure the project consistently passes the `InventoryConcurrencyTest`.
